title: quercus × numidica
intro: Quercus × numidica, also known as Numidia oak, is a hybrid species of oak tree that is native to the Mediterranean region. The leaves and bark of this plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to their high content of tannins and flavonoids, which possess medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus × numidica include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against certain diseases such as cancer and neurodegenerative disorders. Quercus × numidica can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsules, and is also used in traditional remedies for fever reduction and as a natural antiseptic.
